name: Apptrove
description: Mobile measurement partner by Trackier offering install attribution, in-app event tracking and fraud prevention.

seo.title: Apptrove — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Apptrove: Mobile measurement partner by Trackier offering install attribution, in-app event tracking and fraud prevention.

when_to_use: Install attribution with fraud prevention for performance marketing campaigns
In-app event tracking for measuring ROAS across CPI networks
Deferred deep link attribution for mobile referral and invite programs
Agency-friendly MMP dashboard with multi-client campaign reporting

pros: Full MMP feature set from Trackier at lower price
Strong fit for emerging markets in India and MENA
Responsive support compared with larger vendors
cons: Smaller brand than AppsFlyer, Adjust or Branch
Partner catalog thinner for niche ad networks
SKAN 4 and privacy tooling still catching up
review.verdict: Competitive budget MMP with fraud bundled in, but ecosystem depth lags the Tier-1 measurement vendors.
review.best_for: Price-sensitive app marketers in India, MENA and LATAM wanting an MMP plus fraud suite.
review.not_for: Enterprise teams that need deepest partner catalog and strictest SLAs.
